mapper.select:
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderList: 관리자 주문 목록 조회 */ SELECT OD.ORD_NO , OD.ORD_DTL_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT , OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM , OD.GOODS_ID , OD.SIZE_ID , (COALESCE(OD.SUPPLY_AMT, 0) * COALESCE(OD.ORD_QTY, 0)) AS SUPPLY_AMT , ((COALESCE(OD.SALE_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) * COALESCE(OD.ORD_QTY, 0)) AS SALE_AMT , GREATEST( ((COALESCE(OD.SALE_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) * COALESCE(OD.ORD_QTY, 0)) - COALESCE(OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OD.POINT_USE_AMT, 0), 0 ) AS FINAL_PAY_AMT , COALESCE(OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS GOODS_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS CART_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(OD.POINT_USE_AMT, 0) AS POINT_USE_AMT , COALESCE(OB.ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS DELIVERY_FEE_AMT FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO
ORDER BY COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) DESC, OD.ORD_NO DESC, OD.ORD_DTL_NO ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderCount: 관리자 주문 목록 조회 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderStartDeliveryList: 관리자 배송 시작 관리 목록 조회 */ SELECT OD.ORD_NO , OD.ORD_DTL_NO , COALESCE(GB.GOODS_NM, '') AS GOODS_NM , OD.GOODS_ID , OD.SIZE_ID , OD.DELV_COMP_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('DELV_COMP', OD.DELV_COMP_CD) AS DELV_COMP_NM , OD.INVOICE_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS PAY_DT , OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OD.GOODS_ID
ORDER BY COALESCE(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) DESC, OD.ORD_NO DESC, OD.ORD_DTL_NO ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderStartDeliveryCount: 관리자 배송 시작 관리 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OD.GOODS_ID
/* GoodsMapper.getGoodsMerchList: 상품 분류 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_MERCH_ID , GOODS_MERCH_NM FROM GOODS_MERCH_BASE ORDER BY GOODS_MERCH_ID
/* GoodsMapper.getBrandList: 브랜드 목록 조회 */ SELECT BRAND_NO , BRAND_NM , BRAND_LOGO_PATH FROM BRAND_BASE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, BRAND_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsDetail: 관리자 상품 상세 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , GOODS_DIV_CD , GOODS_STAT_CD , GOODS_NM , GOODS_GROUP_ID , GOODS_MERCH_ID , SUPPLY_AMT , SALE_AMT , SHOW_YN , ERP_SUPPLY_AMT , ERP_COST_AMT , ERP_STYLE_CD , ERP_COLOR_CD , ERP_MERCH_CD FROM GOODS_BASE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryTreeList: 관리자 카테고리 트리 목록 조회 */ SELECT C1.CATEGORY_ID , C1.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , C1.CATEGORY_LEVEL , C1.CATEGORY_NM , C1.DISP_ORD , C1.SHOW_YN , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CATEGORY C2 WHERE C2.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = C1.CATEGORY_ID ) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM CATEGORY C1 ORDER BY C1.CATEGORY_LEVEL ASC, C1.DISP_ORD ASC, C1.CATEGORY_ID ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryDetail: 관리자 카테고리 상세 조회 */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID , PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_LEVEL , CATEGORY_NM , DISP_ORD , SHOW_YN FROM CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryGoodsList: 카테고리별 상품 목록 조회 */ SELECT CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.GOODS_ID , CG.DISP_ORD , GB.ERP_STYLE_CD , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.GOODS_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('GOODS_STAT', GB.GOODS_STAT_CD) AS GOODS_STAT_NM , GB.GOODS_DIV_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('GOODS_DIV', GB.GOODS_DIV_CD) AS GOODS_DIV_NM , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = GB.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.GOODS_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.countShopCategoryGoods: 쇼핑몰 카테고리 화면 상품 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND C.SHOW_YN = 'Y' JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' AND GB.SALE_AMT >= 990 WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCategoryGoodsList: 쇼핑몰 카테고리 화면 상품 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) AS SECONDARY_IMG_PATH , CG.DISP_ORD FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND C.SHOW_YN = 'Y' JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' AND GB.SALE_AMT >= 990 LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.GOODS_ID ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsBasic: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 기본 상품 정보 조회 */ SELECT GB.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.GOODS_GROUP_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , BB.BRAND_NM , BB.BRAND_LOGO_PATH , BB.BRAND_NOTI , GB.ERP_COLOR_CD , GC.COLOR_NM , GC.COLOR_RGB , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , GB.SHOW_YN , GB.GOODS_STAT_CD FROM GOODS_BASE GB LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_COLOR GC ON GC.ERP_COLOR_CD = GB.ERP_COLOR_CD WHERE GB.GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' LIMIT 1
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsImageList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 이미지 목록 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, IMG_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsSizeList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 사이즈/재고 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , DISP_ORD FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, SIZE_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsGroupItemList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 동일 그룹 상품 목록 조회 */ SELECT GB.GOODS_ID , GB.ERP_COLOR_CD , GC.COLOR_NM , GC.COLOR_RGB , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = GB.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS FIRST_IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_BASE GB LEFT JOIN GOODS_COLOR GC ON GC.ERP_COLOR_CD = GB.ERP_COLOR_CD WHERE GB.GOODS_GROUP_ID = #{goodsGroupId} AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' ORDER BY GB.GOODS_ID ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsDescItemList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 기기별 설명 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , DEVICE_GB_CD , GOODS_DESC FROM GOODS_DESC WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DEVICE_GB_CD ASC

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageWishGoods: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 위시리스트 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WISH_LIST WL JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE WL.CUST_NO = #{custNo}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageWishGoodsList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 위시리스트 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT WL.CUST_NO , WL.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM WISH_LIST WL JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE WL.CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY WL.REG_DT DESC, WL.GOODS_ID DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageOwnedCoupon: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 쿠폰함 사용 가능 보유 쿠폰 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOwnedCouponPageList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 쿠폰함 사용 가능 보유 쿠폰 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CC.CUST_CPN_NO , CC.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT IS NULL OR CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT END AS CPN_USABLE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT IS NULL OR CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT END AS CPN_USABLE_END_DT FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT ORDER BY CC.CUST_CPN_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageDownloadableCoupon: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COUPON_BASE CB WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59')

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageDownloadableCouponPageList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageDownloadableCouponList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderGroup: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문상세 주문번호 1건 조회 */ SELECT OB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT FROM ORDER_BASE OB WHERE OB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND OB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OB.ORD_STAT_CD != 'ORD_STAT_00' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD WHERE OD.ORD_NO = OB.ORD_NO AND OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD != 'ORD_DTL_STAT_00' ) LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderAmountSummary: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문상세 금액 요약 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(OD.SUPPLY_AMT, 0) * COALESCE(OD.ORD_QTY, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_SUPPLY_AMT , COALESCE(SUM((COALESCE(OD.SALE_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) * COALESCE(OD.ORD_QTY, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_ORDER_AMT , 0 AS TOTAL_GOODS_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_GOODS_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_CART_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(OD.POINT_USE_AMT, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_POINT_USE_AMT , COALESCE(MAX(OB.ORD_DELV_AMT), 0) AS DELIVERY_FEE_AMT , COALESCE(MAX(OB.DELV_CPN_DC_AMT), 0) AS DELIVERY_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , 0 AS FINAL_PAY_AMT FROM ORDER_BASE OB JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON OD.ORD_NO = OB.ORD_NO WHERE OB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND OB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD != 'ORD_DTL_STAT_00'

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderCancelReasonList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문취소 사유 코드 목록 조회 */ SELECT CD , CD_NM FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE GRP_CD = 'CHG_REASON' AND CD LIKE 'C_%' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CD ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderReturnReasonList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품 사유 코드 목록 조회 */ SELECT CD , CD_NM FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE GRP_CD = 'CHG_REASON' AND CD LIKE 'R_%' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CD ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderReturnFeeContext: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품 배송비 계산 이력 컨텍스트 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD IN ('R', 'E') AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND ( (OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'R_2%') OR (OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'E' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'E_2%') ) ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS HAS_PRIOR_COMPANY_FAULT_RETURN_OR_EXCHANGE , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) < 0 AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'R_1%' ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS HAS_PRIOR_CUSTOMER_FAULT_RETURN_DEDUCTION FROM DUAL

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOrderStatusSummary: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문내역 상태 요약 건수 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS WAITING_FOR_DEPOSIT_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PAYMENT_COMPLETED_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PRODUCT_PREPARING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DELIVERY_PREPARING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_05' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SHIPPING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_06' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DELIVERY_COMPLETED_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_07' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PURCHASE_CONFIRMED_COUNT FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO WHERE OB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND OB.ORD_STAT_CD != 'ORD_STAT_00' AND COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) >= #{startDateTime} AND COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) < #{endExclusiveDateTime} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_DETAIL ACTIVE_OD WHERE ACTIVE_OD.ORD_NO = OB.ORD_NO AND ACTIVE_OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD NOT IN ('ORD_DTL_STAT_00', 'ORD_DTL_STAT_99') )

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCartItemList: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 목록 조회 */ SELECT C.CART_ID , C.CART_GB_CD , C.CUST_NO , C.GOODS_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.GOODS_NM , C.SIZE_ID , C.QTY , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , GS.ADD_AMT , C.EXHIBITION_NO , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CART C JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID JOIN GOODS_SIZE GS ON GS.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID AND GS.SIZE_ID = C.SIZE_ID LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE C.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND C.CART_GB_CD = 'C' ORDER BY C.REG_DT DESC, C.CART_ID DESC, C.GOODS_ID DESC, C.SIZE_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderAddressList: 쇼핑몰 주문서 배송지 목록 조회 */ SELECT CUST_NO , ADDRESS_NM , POST_NO , BASE_ADDRESS , DETAIL_ADDRESS , PHONE_NUMBER , RSV_NM , DEFAULT_YN FROM CUSTOMER_ADDRESS WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY CASE DEFAULT_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC , REG_DT DESC , ADDRESS_NM ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderCustomerInfo: 쇼핑몰 주문 결제 기본 고객 정보 조회 */ SELECT CB.CUST_NO , CB.CUST_NM , CB.EMAIL , CB.PHONE_NUMBER , CB.CUST_GRADE_CD FROM CUSTOMER_BASE CB WHERE CB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopPaymentByPayNo: 쇼핑몰 결제번호 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE PAY_NO = #{payNo} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopPaymentByTossPaymentKeyHash: Toss 결제키 해시 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH = #{tossPaymentKeyHash} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopPaymentByOrdNo: 주문번호 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY PAY_NO DESC LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderPaymentForCancel: 주문취소 대상 원결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND PAY_GB_CD = 'PAY_GB_01' AND PAY_STAT_CD IN ('PAY_STAT_02', 'PAY_STAT_01') ORDER BY PAY_NO DESC LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderCancelOrderBase: 주문취소 처리용 주문 마스터 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORD_NO , CUST_NO , ORD_STAT_CD , CASE WHEN ORDER_DT IS NULL OR ORDER_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(ORDER_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS ORDER_DT , CASE WHEN ORDER_CONFIRM_DT IS NULL OR ORDER_CONFIRM_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS ORDER_CONFIRM_DT , RCV_NM , RCV_POST_NO , RCV_ADDR_BASE , RCV_ADDR_DTL , DELV_CPN_NO , COALESCE(DELV_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS DELV_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS ORD_DELV_AMT , REFUND_BANK_CD , REFUND_BANK_NO , REFUND_HOLDER_NM , DEVICE_GB_CD FROM ORDER_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND ORD_NO = #{ordNo} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopAvailablePointBaseList: 고객의 사용 가능한 포인트 마스터 목록 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , CUST_NO , SAVE_AMT , USE_AMT , RMN_AMT , CASE WHEN EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(EXPIRE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS EXPIRE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(SAVE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SAVE_DT , ORD_NO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND RMN_AMT > 0 AND ( EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR EXPIRE_DT >= NOW() ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC , EXPIRE_DT ASC , SAVE_DT ASC , PNT_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderPointDetailList: 주문번호 기준 포인트 사용 상세 이력 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , PNT_AMT , ORD_NO , BIGO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND PNT_AMT < 0 ORDER BY PNT_NO ASC, REG_DT ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderPointDetailBalanceList: 주문번호 기준 포인트 사용/복구 누적 요약 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , ( SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT < 0 THEN ABS(PNT_AMT) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT > 0 THEN PNT_AMT ELSE 0 END) ) AS PNT_AMT , #{ordNo} AS ORD_NO , '' AS BIGO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} GROUP BY PNT_NO HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT < 0 THEN ABS(PNT_AMT) ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT > 0 THEN PNT_AMT ELSE 0 END) ORDER BY PNT_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopOrderRestoreCartItemList: 주문번호 기준 장바구니 복구 대상 목록 조회 */ SELECT CUST_NO , GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , ORD_QTY , EXHIBITION_NO FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY ORD_DTL_NO ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopCartSiteInfo: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 사이트 배송 기준 정보 조회 */ SELECT SITE_ID , DELIVERY_FEE , DELIVERY_FEE_LIMIT FROM SITE_INFO WHERE SITE_ID = #{siteId} LIMIT 1
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsSiteInfo: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 사이트 배송 기준 정보 조회 */ SELECT SITE_ID , SITE_NM , DELIVERY_FEE , DELIVERY_FEE_LIMIT FROM SITE_INFO WHERE SITE_ID = #{siteId} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopActiveGoodsCouponList: 다운로드 가능한 상품쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_STAT_CD , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND CB.CPN_GB_CD = 'CPN_GB_01' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopCouponTargetList: 상품쿠폰 적용/제외 대상 목록 조회 */ SELECT CPN_NO , TARGET_GB_CD , TARGET_VALUE FROM COUPON_TARGET WHERE CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} ORDER BY TARGET_GB_CD ASC, TARGET_VALUE ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCustomerCouponList: 고객의 현재 사용 가능한 보유 쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CC.CUST_CPN_NO , CC.CUST_NO , CC.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_STAT_CD , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT , CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND CB.CPN_GB_CD IN ('CPN_GB_01', 'CPN_GB_03', 'CPN_GB_04') AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT ORDER BY CC.CPN_NO ASC , CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT ASC , CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT ASC , CC.CUST_CPN_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getCategoryChildren: 카테고리 하위 목록 조회 */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID , PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_LEVEL , CATEGORY_NM , DISP_ORD , SHOW_YN FROM CATEGORY WHERE PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = #{parentCategoryId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CATEGORY_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsCategoryList: 관리자 상품 카테고리 목록 조회 */ SELECT CG.GOODS_ID , CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.DISP_ORD , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 1 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 2 THEN P1.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 3 THEN P2.CATEGORY_ID END AS LEVEL1_ID , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 1 THEN NULL WHEN 2 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 3 THEN P1.CATEGORY_ID END AS LEVEL2_ID , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 3 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID ELSE NULL END AS LEVEL3_ID FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY P1 ON P1.CATEGORY_ID = C.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY P2 ON P2.CATEGORY_ID = P1.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID WHERE CG.GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CATEGORY CHILD JOIN CATEGORY_GOODS CHILD_CG ON CHILD_CG.CATEGORY_ID = CHILD.CATEGORY_ID WHERE CHILD.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND CHILD_CG.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ) ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.CATEGORY_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsSizeList: 관리자 상품 사이즈 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , ERP_SYNC_YN , ERP_SIZE_CD , DISP_ORD , DEL_YN FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, SIZE_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsSizeDetail: 관리자 상품 사이즈 단건 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , ERP_SYNC_YN , ERP_SIZE_CD , DISP_ORD , DEL_YN FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND SIZE_ID = #{sizeId}
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsImageList: 관리자 상품 이미지 목록 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, IMG_NO ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsImageByNo: 관리자 상품 이미지 단건 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE IMG_NO = #{imgNo}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageCancelHistoryItemByClmNo: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 취소상세 클레임 단건 조회 */ SELECT OCB.CLM_NO , OCB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OCB.CHG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CHG_DT , OCB.CHG_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_STAT', OCB.CHG_STAT_CD) AS CHG_STAT_NM , COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) AS PAY_DELV_AMT , COALESCE(P.CNL_AMT, 0) AS REFUNDED_CASH_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO WHERE OCB.REG_NO = #{custNo} AND OCB.CLM_NO = #{clmNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'C'

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypagePointItemList: 마이페이지 포인트 적립/차감 내역 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CPD.PNT_NO , CPD.PNT_AMT , CPD.ORD_NO , CPD.BIGO , DATE_FORMAT(CPD.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DT FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL CPD INNER JOIN CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE CPB ON CPB.PNT_NO = CPD.PNT_NO WHERE CPB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY CPD.REG_DT DESC, CPD.PNT_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageExpiringPointAmt: 마이페이지 7일 이내 만료 예정 포인트 합계 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(RMN_AMT), 0) FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND RMN_AMT > 0 AND EXPIRE_DT IS NOT NULL AND EXPIRE_DT != '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND EXPIRE_DT >= NOW() AND EXPIRE_DT < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderMaster: 관리자 주문 상세 마스터 정보 조회 */ SELECT OB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OB.ORDER_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT , DATE_FORMAT(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_CONFIRM_DT , CB.CUST_NM , CB.PHONE_NUMBER AS CUST_PHONE_NUMBER , CB.EMAIL AS CUST_EMAIL , OB.RCV_NM , OB.RCV_POST_NO , OB.RCV_ADDR_BASE , OB.RCV_ADDR_DTL , COALESCE(OB.ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS ORD_DELV_AMT , COALESCE(OB.DELV_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS DELV_CPN_DC_AMT FROM ORDER_BASE OB JOIN CUSTOMER_BASE CB ON CB.CUST_NO = OB.CUST_NO WHERE OB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderDetailList: 관리자 주문 상세 목록 조회 */ SELECT ORD_DTL_NO , ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM , GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , ORD_QTY , CNC_QTY , RMN_QTY , SUPPLY_AMT , (SALE_AMT + ADD_AMT) AS SALE_AMT , COALESCE(GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS CART_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(POINT_USE_AMT, 0) AS POINT_USE_AMT , GREATEST( (SALE_AMT + ADD_AMT) * RMN_QTY - COALESCE(GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(POINT_USE_AMT, 0), 0 ) AS FINAL_PAY_AMT FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY ORD_DTL_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderClaimList: 관리자 주문 상세 하단 클레임 목록 조회 */ SELECT OCD.CLM_NO , OCD.CHG_DTL_GB_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_DTL_GB', OCD.CHG_DTL_GB_CD) AS CHG_DTL_GB_NM , OCD.ORD_NO , OCD.ORD_DTL_NO , OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_DTL_STAT', OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD) AS CHG_DTL_STAT_NM , OCD.GOODS_ID , OCD.SIZE_ID , OCD.CHG_REASON_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_REASON', OCD.CHG_REASON_CD) AS CHG_REASON_NM , OCD.CHG_REASON_DTL , GB.GOODS_NM , OCD.QTY , (COALESCE(OD.SALE_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OCD.ADD_AMT, OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) AS SALE_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS CART_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.POINT_DC_AMT, 0) AS POINT_DC_AMT , GREATEST( ((COALESCE(OD.SALE_AMT, 0) + COALESCE(OCD.ADD_AMT, OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) * COALESCE(OCD.QTY, 0)) - COALESCE(OCD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OCD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OCD.POINT_DC_AMT, 0), 0 ) AS EXPECTED_REFUND_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB ON OCB.CLM_NO = OCD.CLM_NO AND OCB.ORD_NO = OCD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON OD.ORD_NO = OCD.ORD_NO AND OD.ORD_DTL_NO = OCD.ORD_DTL_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OCD.GOODS_ID WHERE OCD.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY OCB.CHG_DT DESC, OCD.CLM_NO DESC, OCD.ORD_DTL_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminOrderPaymentList: 관리자 주문 상세 하단 결제 목록 조회 */ SELECT P.ORD_NO , P.CLM_NO , P.PAY_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PAY_STAT', P.PAY_STAT_CD) AS PAY_STAT_NM , P.PAY_METHOD_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PAY_METHOD', P.PAY_METHOD_CD) AS PAY_METHOD_NM , COALESCE(P.PAY_AMT, 0) AS PAY_AMT , P.TRADE_NO , P.RSP_CODE , P.RSP_MSG , P.BANK_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('BANK', P.BANK_CD) AS BANK_NM , P.BANK_NO , OB.REFUND_BANK_CD , OB.REFUND_BANK_NO , CASE WHEN COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) IS NULL OR COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS PROCESS_DT FROM PAYMENT P JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = P.ORD_NO WHERE P.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND P.PAY_STAT_CD != 'PAY_STAT_00' ORDER BY COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) DESC, P.PAY_NO DESC
